use_cases: Displaying status indicators like 'new', 'hot', or 'sale' on product and content cards
Showing categorical tag labels for filtering and organization in content management
Indicating notification counts or unread message badges in dashboards and inboxes
Highlighting feature availability or subscription tier labels in SaaS interfaces
Marking validation states like 'success', 'warning', or 'error' in form-heavy applications
ai_summary: A lightweight, reusable badge component with four style variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline) following shadcn/ui design patterns. Built with class-variance-authority for consistent variant-based styling and includes focus and hover states for accessibility. Serves as an atomic building block for displaying labels, tags, and status indicators across various interface contexts.
